user_task_description: This slide outline has the wrong bullet hierarchy: some items that should be sub-points are currently at the top level.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Fix the outline hierarchy so that task-level items are nested correctly under their parent workstreams.
atomic_scope: Only hierarchy editing is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised .pptx deck with corrected bullet hierarchy.

notes.Why This Variant Is Hard:
- The text content itself is fine, but the structural levels are wrong
- A visual fix is not enough if the logical bullet levels remain incorrect
- Multiple lines need consistent promotion/demotion decisions
